title: S + keep/leave + O + V-ing/adj.（保持狀態）

formulas.zh: 讓某人或物保持（某狀態）；也可表示持續做某事
持續進行某動作，不間斷地做某事

explanation: 此句型用於表達保持狀態或持續動作。keep/leave後接受詞（名詞或代詞），再加現在分詞或形容詞，表讓某人或物維持特定狀態。如「keep the door open」。當keep單獨後接V-ing時，表示持續或反覆進行某動作，無受詞。易混淆處：形容詞與現在分詞的選擇需依狀態或動作性質判斷；「leave O adj.」強調靜態狀態。

examples.eng: Please keep the windows open during the day to let fresh air in.
examples.chi: 請在白天保持窗戶開著以讓新鮮空氣進入。

examples.eng: The teacher left the classroom empty after the final exam ended.
examples.chi: 期末考結束後，老師讓教室保持空著。

examples.eng: He kept calling his friend until someone finally answered the phone.
examples.chi: 他持續打電話給他的朋友直到有人終於接聽。

examples.eng: Don't keep the light on when you leave the office at night.
examples.chi: 你晚上離開辦公室時不要讓燈保持開著。

adj_table_for.zh: 等待中的（現在分詞作形容詞）
運行中的（現在分詞作形容詞）
上鎖的（過去分詞作形容詞）

extension.tip: 判斷技巧：若表「靜態狀況」用形容詞（如open, closed, clean）；若表「動態進行」用現在分詞（如calling, working, playing）。keep V-ing不需受詞，表持續反覆；keep O adj./V-ing則需受詞。注意leave O adj.強調狀態留下。

examples.test: Keep the door _____ (open/opening) for the guests.
examples.result: → Keep the door open（形容詞，保持開啟狀態）

examples.test: He kept _____ (talk/talking) about the same topic.
examples.result: → He kept talking（V-ing，持續進行的動作）

examples.test: Don't leave the children _____ (alone/aloning) in the house.
examples.result: → Don't leave the children alone（形容詞，靜態狀態）

extension.note: 形容詞→靜態狀態；V-ing→動態進行；keep O adj./V-ing有受詞，keep V-ing無受詞。

exercises.sentence: You should keep your room clean and organized.
exercises.translation: 你應該保持你的房間乾淨且有序。

parts: in the crib while she prepared dinner.
exercises.sentence: The mother left her baby sleeping in the crib while she prepared dinner.
exercises.translation: 媽媽在準備晚餐時讓她的嬰兒在嬰兒床裡睡著。

parts: trying hard, you will eventually succeed in this project.
exercises.sentence: If you keep trying hard, you will eventually succeed in this project.
exercises.translation: 如果你持續努力，你最終會在這個專案中成功。

parts: to prevent the rain from coming in.
exercises.sentence: Please keep the windows closed to prevent the rain from coming in.
exercises.translation: 請保持窗戶關閉以防止雨水進來。
